name: Planet humans au :3
description:
Each planet and the sun have their own personalities. The charachters are Sun, Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, and Neptune. Dwarf planets are here too. Moons:

Earth: Moon

Mars: Phobos, Deimos

Jupiter: Ganymede, Europa, Callisto, and Io

Saturn: Titan, Rhea, Dione, Tethys, Enceladus

Uranus: Titania, Oberon, Ariel, Umbriel, Miranda

Neptune: you guessed it, Triton.
creator: Catlady_5000
